title: anthyllis vulneraria f. albiflora
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. albiflora, also known as white kidney vetch or white alpine kidney vetch, is a flowering plant in the legume family, characterized by its white flowers and kidney-shaped seed pods. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and skin issues such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria f. albiflora include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
